overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game showing the protagonist in civilian attire (hoodie and backpack) initially standing on an urban waterfront promenade before walking along the path. The scene features a modern glass skyline across the water, pedestrians passing by, and transitions from an open observation area to a tree-lined walkway.

agents.ego_description: standing still on the waterfront promenade, facing the river and looking out at the city skyline across the water

entered.detail: silver metal barrier separating the walkway from the water
calm river water with gentle ripples reflecting sunlight
cluster of modern glass and steel skyscrapers across the river
paved pedestrian walkway with shadow patterns from the railing

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary on a wide-open waterfront promenade, facing a calm river with a modern glass skyline visible across the water. The metal railing casts striped shadows on the concrete walkway under bright midday sun. The area is sparsely populated with open sky overhead.

events.description: character transitions from standing still to walking forward along the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: man in gray jacket walking past the character from left to right

entered.detail: row of mature deciduous trees with green foliage lining the walkway
wooden dock structure extending into the river water
line of parked vehicles visible through the trees along the adjacent street

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along the waterfront promenade, transitioning from the open observation area into a section lined with mature trees on the right. Pedestrians walk in the opposing direction, and a wooden pier becomes visible extending into the river. Parked cars line the street behind the tree line as the camera follows the character's steady forward movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, open waterfront observation area into a shaded, tree-lined urban walkway. It begins with the character standing stationary on a concrete promenade, facing a calm river and a modern glass skyline under the bright midday sun. As the character starts to walk forward, the scene shifts from the open expanse of the waterfront toward a section bordered by mature trees and parked cars. The camera maintains a steady pace, passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction as a wooden pier emerges along the river's edge. The movement finally carries the character deeper into the greenery, leaving the striped shadows of the metal railings behind for the dappled light of the tree-lined path.
